name: Button

semanticTypeCandidates.evidence: Warm orange filled button for main call-to-action
Dark surface outlined button for supporting actions

representativeVariants.name: Primary Button
representativeVariants.whySelected: Core CTA using warm orange — the brand signature accent

representativeVariants.name: Secondary Button
representativeVariants.whySelected: Dark surface button for secondary actions — flat with subtle border

representativeVariants.name: Ghost Button
representativeVariants.whySelected: Transparent button with orange text — minimal footprint tertiary action

anatomy.description: Text label, center-aligned, single line, no text-transform
Rectangular flat container, no shadow, sharp 4px radius

structurePatterns: Inline-flex container, items center, justify center
Gap var(--space-2) between icon and label if icon present

bestPractices: One primary button per view for the main action
Secondary for supporting actions alongside primary
Ghost for tertiary or low-priority actions
Size sm for dense table rows, lg for hero/empty-state CTAs

doNotInvent: Icon-only buttons (not in spec — text label required)
Drop shadows on buttons (brand is flat)
unknowns: Exact hover/active darken ratio — infer 8-12% darken
keyInsightSeed: Warm orange primary CTA, flat dark secondary, no shadows
